title: Halo: Campaign Evolved arrives with positive reviews, but early access on Xbox sparks controversy
summary: The remake of the saga lands on PlayStation and PC with good reviews, although Xbox players who paid to play early encounter technical blocks.

title: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game suffers a last-minute delay on Xbox Series
summary: Paramount's fighting game is delayed on Xbox just hours before its launch, while the Switch version will lack cross-play.

title: Zach Cregger's new Resident Evil trailer excites fans with its fidelity to the games
summary: The first images of the cinematic reboot show direct connections to the video games and a horror tone that has positively surprised critics and audiences.

title: Marvel Tōkon reveals details of its beta and Wolverine presents its first story trailer
summary: The new Marvel fighting game announces its beta date and new characters, while the Wolverine game shows its story and sparks debate over Logan's design.

title: Xbox begins testing free cloud gaming with advertisements
summary: Microsoft explores a new model that allows playing from the cloud without a subscription in exchange for watching ads, promising they will not interrupt the gaming experience.

title: European Commission approves Saudi Arabia's purchase of EA for $55 billion
summary: Brussels gives the green light to the largest private acquisition in video game history, considering that the deal does not pose competition issues in the market.

title: Bethesda union denounces labor violations after mass layoffs at Xbox studios
summary: Laid-off Bethesda Montreal employees receive the minimum legal severance, prompting a formal complaint from the union and accusations of non-compliance with Canadian labor law.

title: Shigeru Miyamoto defends Nintendo remakes and criticizes short-termism in the video game industry
summary: The creator of Mario justifies the production of remakes like Ocarina of Time as legacy preservation, and reveals that the Mario Galaxy movie prompted new Star Fox and Yoshi games.

title: Ubisoft CEO downplays the end of PlayStation discs while experts warn of million-dollar losses
summary: Yves Guillemot believes that the end of physical media will not change the industry, but analysts warn of the disappearance of a $7.2 billion business.

title: Batman: Caped Crusader – Chronicles announced, a mystery and party game for Amazon Luna
summary: The new Dark Knight title moves away from the action genre to offer a crime-solving experience on Amazon's cloud gaming platform.

title: Xenoblade Chronicles 2: Nintendo Switch 2 Edition shows its new features in an extensive trailer
summary: The enhanced edition for the new console reveals new outfits for Pyra and Mythra, as well as improvements to mercenary assault and combat mechanics.

title: Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World details its creation system and new creatures
summary: The new title in Square Enix's monster sub-franchise delves into its synthesis mechanics and reveals several of the strange creatures that players can recruit.

title: Xbox announces backward compatibility for PC and handheld devices
summary: Microsoft responds to one of the most frequent player complaints by allowing games from past Xbox generations to be played on computers and handheld consoles.

title: GSC Game World denies that Xbox paid more for Stalker 2 exclusivity than its development cost
summary: The current developer of the game contradicts the original founder of the studio, stating that the figures regarding the exclusivity agreement with Microsoft are not accurate.

title: EA Sports FC 27 includes an open world and a controversial $150 Ultimate Plus edition
summary: EA's football simulator introduces an open world mode for the first time, although the announcement is marred by an even more expensive edition than the Ultimate Edition.

title: Former Disney CEO Michael Eisner says he doesn't recall approving the first Kingdom Hearts
summary: Despite being the one who greenlit the crossover between Disney and Square Enix, Eisner admits to having no memory of the decision that created one of the most beloved video game franchises.

title: Amazon clarifies it will not take James Bond away from IO Interactive but does not rule out buying the studio
summary: The tech giant denies rumors of changing developers for the 007 franchise, though it leaves open the possibility of acquiring IO Interactive after the success of First Light.

title: Star Wars Zero Company reveals its voice cast and confirms it will be a linear experience
summary: Bit Reactor's tactical game will feature actors from The Clone Wars, will last 30 to 40 hours, and will not include official mod support or New Game+.

title: Former PlayStation CEO Shawn Layden calls for the return of AA games to save the industry
summary: The veteran executive criticizes the inflation of AAA budgets and advocates for revitalizing mid-sized games as a solution to the sector's sustainability problems.

title: Sony releases a new firmware update for PS5 that improves readability
summary: The new PlayStation patch makes reading easier on the console's interface, amid the debate generated by Sony's plans to abandon physical media.

title: Rockstar workers' union reaches historic high in membership and meets with GTA 6 management
summary: The Rockstar Games union, which could force mandatory recognition, holds a first meeting with studio executives and describes it as a step in the right direction.

title: Pokémon TCG Pocket launches 'Ruler of the Skies' expansion with Mega Rayquaza
summary: The popular mobile collectible card game receives a new update that introduces cards from the Hoenn region and the long-awaited Mega Evolution mechanic.

title: Lego presents a Donkey Kong Arcade set that pays homage to the 1981 classic
summary: The new construction set, available in August 2026, faithfully recreates the original Donkey Kong arcade machine, predating the creation of the name Mario.
